title: TexLab Palette File (.texpal)
description: Canonical v1 schema for the shareable palette format used by the TexLab Palette panel (feature 011-palette-panel).

version.description: Schema version. Readers MUST reject any value other than 1.

id.description: Zero-padded 32-char hex representation of the palette UUIDv4. Preserved across renames.

name.description: Human-readable palette name. Trimmed, NFC-normalized by readers; rejected if empty after trimming.

items.description: Opaque RGB color as a 7-character hex string.

colors.description: Ordered list of opaque RGB colors. Readers silently deduplicate, preserving the first occurrence of each color and emitting a warning log.
